title: Audio Engine & Replay Systems
summary: Transforms audio from weakest dimension (4/10) into a distinctive identity. Adds audio effects processing (reverb, compression), gate-specific sound signatures, wire pitch escalation, breadboard environmental reactivity, gate-colored simulation glow, wire drawing progressive reveal, auto-save mid-puzzle, par benchmarks, pure logic badge (replacing hint penalty), and replay ghost overlay for optimization.

tasks.description: Add audio effects processing chain: create a master bus with convolver reverb (impulse response), compressor, and subtle delay. All existing sounds route through this chain for spatial depth.
acceptance_criteria: All sounds play through reverb + compressor chain
Reverb is subtle (short decay ~0.3s) not cavernous
Compressor tames loud peaks without killing dynamics
No audible artifacts or clicks

tasks.description: Gate-type sound signatures: AND=clean sine click, OR=warm saw click, NOT=sharp square snap, XOR=bell-like FM tone. Replace generic playClick() with playGatePlace(type).
acceptance_criteria: Each gate type produces a distinct sound when placed
Players can identify gate types by sound alone
Sounds are pleasant and not jarring

tasks.description: Wire connection sound pitch escalation: each successive wire in a session plays at a slightly higher pitch (semitone steps), creating musical progression. Reset on level load/clear.
acceptance_criteria: First wire plays base pitch, each subsequent wire is ~1 semitone higher
Pitch resets on level load and circuit clear
Escalation caps at reasonable limit (12 semitones / 1 octave)

tasks.description: Wire drawing progressive reveal: when a wire is first drawn successfully, a bright energy dot animates from source to destination along the bezier path over ~300ms.
acceptance_criteria: Bright dot animates along new wire path on connection
Animation completes in ~300ms
Dot has glow trail effect
Does not interfere with normal wire rendering

tasks.description: Breadboard environmental reactivity: during simulation, breadboard copper traces near active wires glow. Draw glowing trace segments near high-signal wires.
acceptance_criteria: Copper traces glow near active wires during simulation
Glow fades when simulation ends
Effect is subtle and atmospheric, not distracting

tasks.description: Gate-colored glow during simulation: gates glow their type-specific color (AND=yellow, OR=cyan, NOT=red-orange, XOR=purple) instead of uniform green.
acceptance_criteria: Each active gate glows its own type color during simulation
Colors match GateTypes definitions
Glow pulses subtly for alive feel

tasks.description: Auto-save circuit state mid-puzzle: save gates, wires, and level ID to localStorage on every gate/wire change. Restore on return to same level.
acceptance_criteria: Circuit state persists across page reload
Loading a level restores saved circuit if available
Clearing circuit also clears saved state
Completing a level clears saved state for that level

tasks.description: Remove hint star penalty, add 'Pure Logic' badge: hints no longer reduce max stars. Track 'pure logic' (no hints used) as a separate bronze badge icon on level select.
acceptance_criteria: Hints no longer reduce star rating
Level select shows a small brain emoji badge on levels completed without hints
Hint penalty UI elements are removed
Pure Logic achievement still works

tasks.description: Par benchmarks display: after completing a level, show par gate count (optimal from level data) and a simulated community average. Display as 'You: X gates | Par: Y | Avg: Z'.
acceptance_criteria: Post-completion star display shows par comparison
Par = level.optimalGates
Community avg = optimalGates + random 0-2 (seeded by level ID for consistency)
Text is clear and motivates optimization

tasks.description: Replay ghost overlay: when replaying a solved level, show translucent outlines of your previous solution's gates and wires. Toggle-able with a button.
acceptance_criteria: Ghost overlay appears when loading a previously-solved level
Ghost gates/wires are translucent (30% opacity)
Toggle button shows/hides ghost
Ghost does not interfere with interaction

testing_focus: All audio sounds play correctly through effects chain
Gate placement sounds are distinct per type
Pure logic badge appears on level select
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
